role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues (Atlantic vs. others).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Eucalyptus) and seasonal states (dormant deciduous trees).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Assessed camera generation quality and general infrastructure genericness.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region and country. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence regarding the specific vegetation (Eucalyptus + dormant deciduous trees) which was the primary differentiator. The final decision was well-reasoned.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of eucalyptus and rolling hills match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the mix of evergreen eucalyptus and dormant deciduous trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and width described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera quality assessment is consistent with the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction (Spain) matches the ground truth.
